modules.title: Welcome to the training library
modules.shortDescription: How this self-study area works alongside your cases and competency milestones.

modules.title: Volume 1: Foundations of Clinical Trichology
modules.shortDescription: Physician-led trichology foundations: follicle biology, consultation structure, and the scientific framework for later modules.

modules.title: Volume 2: Diagnostic Trichology and Pattern Hair Loss Medicine
modules.shortDescription: Structured examination, trichoscopy, investigation logic, and planning for male and female pattern hair loss.

modules.title: Volume 3: Diffuse Shedding, Immune-Mediated Hair Loss, Cicatricial Alopecia and Scalp Disease
modules.shortDescription: Diffuse shedding, alopecia areata, inflammatory and scarring alopecia, and scalp conditions requiring timely diagnosis.

modules.title: Volume 4: Therapeutics, Regenerative Medicine and Foundations of Hair Restoration Surgery
modules.shortDescription: Therapeutics and regenerative principles linked to surgical restoration fundamentals.

modules.title: Volume 5: Advanced Surgical Integration, Professional Practice, Research Literacy and Certification
modules.shortDescription: Advanced integration and professional standards for higher-level trainee progression.

modules.title: Module 1: Hair Science, Anatomy, and Hair Loss Drivers
modules.shortDescription: Core science primer covering follicular biology, scalp anatomy, and common drivers of hair loss.

modules.title: Module 2: Classification of Hair Loss
modules.shortDescription: Structured classification frameworks to support differential diagnosis and treatment planning.

modules.title: Module 4: Diagnosis Using Trichoscopy
modules.shortDescription: Practical trichoscopy interpretation to improve pattern recognition and diagnostic confidence.

modules.title: Module 5: Treatment Planning and Clinical Decision
modules.shortDescription: Clinical decision logic for evidence-aware treatment planning and patient-centered pathways.

modules.title: Module 6: PRP, GFC, and LLLT
modules.shortDescription: Overview of regenerative adjuncts and light-based therapies with clinical context and limitations.

modules.title: Module 8: Exosomes in Hair Restoration
modules.shortDescription: Clinical overview of exosome-based approaches in hair restoration, including use cases, limitations, and responsible integration.

modules.title: Beard Reconstruction and Graft Distribution Guide
modules.shortDescription: A practical clinical guide for beard density correction, donor selection, angulation, distribution, natural pattern creation, and avoiding pluggy or uneven graft placement.
modules.category: Advanced Hairline and Facial Hair Design

modules.title: Eyebrow Reconstruction and Brow Design Guide
modules.shortDescription: A trainee reference for eyebrow restoration, brow shape planning, direction control, graft selection, scar tissue considerations, and density strategy.
modules.category: Advanced Hairline and Facial Hair Design

modules.title: Female Hairline Creation and Feminine Hairline Design Guide
modules.shortDescription: A clinical design guide for creating natural female hairlines, temple rounding, frontal softness, irregularity, density planning, and avoiding masculine or artificial hairline patterns.
modules.category: Advanced Hairline and Facial Hair Design
